name: Nine Trey Gangsters
description: The Nine Trey Gangster Bloods (NTG) are a set of the United Blood Nation formed in 1993 at Rikers Island, operating on the East Coast. They initially sold crack, heroin, and PCP in Harlem from abandoned buildings on Lenox Avenue. Gained notoriety through the 2018 Tekashi 6ix9ine RICO case where the rapper turned state's evidence. They maintain an alliance with the Lucchese crime family for smuggling drugs into East Jersey State Prison. Multiple federal operations (Operation Nine Connect, 83-member indictment) have targeted the gang.

sources.title: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction — Wikipedia
